description: Read-only fleet overview: the roster (~/.cyberware/fleet.json) plus each body's docker container state and /health. Value-free — node metadata only, no secrets or tokens. Tolerates an absent docker daemon and unreachable nodes (a read-only view never fails closed).
rules: read-only: never starts/stops a container, never writes the roster
value-free output: names, roles, tiers, fleet_tiers, chip_sha, run counts — never tokens or user data
a missing docker daemon or unreachable node degrades to container='absent'/health=null, never an error
usage: Optional FLEET_FILE (defaults to ~/.cyberware/fleet.json). Output: ${RECORD_STORE}/status.json (per-node roster + container state + /health).
limitation: Container state needs docker; without it every node reports container='absent' (still succeeds). /health needs network reachability to each node.
